text:
Created attachment 251826
0001-net-p2p-sonarr-Update-to-4.0.6.1805.patch

poudriere ok
Runs in production on my setup (14.1 amd64)

While at it, also added the `export PATH` to give pre and post import scripts access to binaries outside the base system.
Same patch has already been added to radarr and jellyfin (jf needed it for ffmpeg)
